title: Citrusy Aerated Portuguese Brioche French Toast
description: A light and airy breakfast dish from Portugal featuring coconut cream and toasted coconut flakes.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut cream, eggs, granulated sugar, vanilla extract, and salt until smooth.
Add the melted butter, orange zest, and orange juice to the bowl and whisk until combined.
Add the brioche bread cubes to the bowl and toss until the bread is evenly coated with the coconut cream mixture.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the bread cubes in a single layer.
Bake the bread for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown and puffed.
While the bread is baking, toast the coconut flakes in a small skillet over medium heat until lightly browned and fragrant.
Remove the bread from the oven and sprinkle with toasted coconut flakes and fresh mint leaves.
